name: WARren Cromartie
description: MLB Wins Above Replacement (WAR) data from Baseball Reference, covering batting and pitching seasons.
placeholder: Who has the most career WAR among Oakland A's players?

tables.name: batting
tables.description: One row per player-season for batters (AL/NL leagues)

columns.name: positions_retro
columns.description: Retrosheet-derived fielding positions for this season. Comma-separated abbreviations ordered by games played descending, filtered to positions played in ≥3% of games. Values: P, C, 1B, 2B, 3B, SS, LF, CF, RF, DH. Distinguishes LF/CF/RF individually. NULL if no Retrosheet starter data.

columns.name: positions_lahman
columns.description: Lahman-derived fielding positions for this season. Comma-separated abbreviations ordered by games played descending, filtered to ≥3% of games. Values: P, C, 1B, 2B, 3B, SS, OF (outfield not split into LF/CF/RF). NULL if not in Lahman data.

columns.name: position
columns.description: Best available fielding position(s) for this season. Uses positions_retro when available (granular: LF/CF/RF), falls back to positions_lahman (OF for all outfielders), then SP/RP from pitching stats. Use this column for most position queries. Outfielder queries must match LF, CF, RF, and OF (Lahman uses OF; Retrosheet uses LF/CF/RF) — apply the single-position filter pattern for each. Infielders: 1B, 2B, 3B, SS.

columns.name: AB
columns.description: At bats (Lahman, summed across stints; nullable)

columns.name: 2B
columns.description: Doubles (Lahman; nullable). Column name is numeric — quote it as "2B".

columns.name: 3B
columns.description: Triples (Lahman; nullable). Column name is numeric — quote it as "3B".

columns.name: AVG
columns.description: Batting average, H/AB (computed from Lahman; nullable)

columns.name: awards
columns.description: Comma-delimited list of awards WON in this season (winners only, All-Star included). Awards are sorted alphabetically. Examples: 'All-Star', 'All-Star,Gold Glove,MVP'. Attached only to first stint row (stint_ID = 1), NULL on later stints. NULL when no awards won. Source: Lahman AwardsPlayers + AllstarFull. Award inception years: MVP from 1922, All-Star from 1933, Cy Young Award from 1956, Gold Glove from 1957, ROY from 1947. NULL before these years does not mean the player did not deserve the award — it did not exist yet.

notes: Lahman counting stats (AB, R, H, 2B, 3B, HR, RBI, SB, CS, BB, SO, HBP, SF, GIDP), rates (AVG, OBP, SLG), and awards are attached ONLY to the first stint row (stint_ID = 1) and are NULL on later stints. These are full-season totals — do not SUM them when aggregating by player-year. Use MAX(AB), MAX(HR), etc. to pull the season total, or filter WHERE stint_ID = 1
Lahman counting stats and rates are NULL when the season has no matching Lahman row — filter with IS NOT NULL when using them
2B and 3B column names are numeric — always quote them as "2B" and "3B" in SQL
team_ID is lowercase — always compare case-insensitively or use LOWER()
lg_ID for modern baseball is 'AL' and 'NL' — filter WHERE lg_ID IN ('AL', 'NL') unless historical data is needed
WAR NULL means no data — use WHERE WAR IS NOT NULL when aggregating
salary is often NULL — use WHERE salary IS NOT NULL when filtering by salary
position is NULL for some seasons — use WHERE position IS NOT NULL when filtering by position
To filter by a single position X, use: position = 'X' OR position LIKE 'X,%' OR position LIKE '%,X,%' OR position LIKE '%,X'

Position groups — outfielders (OF/LF/CF/RF): position IN ('LF','CF','RF','OF') OR position LIKE 'LF,%' OR ... (apply the single-position pattern for each of LF, CF, RF, OF). Lahman-derived rows use 'OF'; Retrosheet-derived rows use 'LF','CF','RF' — matching all four codes covers both sources. Infielders: 1B, 2B, 3B, SS. Middle infielders: 2B, SS. Corner infielders: 1B, 3B. Position players (non-pitchers/hitters): C, 1B, 2B, 3B, SS, LF, CF, RF, OF, DH. Pitchers: P.
SP and RP are used in the pitching table only — not in the batting table
Baseball Reference player links: '[' || name_common || '](https://www.baseball-reference.com/players/' || LOWER(LEFT(player_ID, 1)) || '/' || player_ID || '.shtml)' AS player

IMPORTANT: When querying for seasons where a player did NOT win an award (e.g., awards IS NULL or awards NOT LIKE '%All-Star%'), always restrict year_ID to on or after the award's inception: All-Star >= 1933, MVP >= 1922, Cy Young Award >= 1956, Gold Glove >= 1957, ROY >= 1947. Without this filter, pre-inception seasons will incorrectly appear as snubs.

tables.name: pitching
tables.description: One row per player-season for pitchers (AL/NL leagues)

columns.name: positions
columns.description: Pitcher role: always 'SP' (starter) or 'RP' (reliever). SP if GS > (G - GS), otherwise RP. Uses Retrosheet data when available, otherwise inferred from pitching stats. NULL if data unavailable.

columns.name: lh_GS
columns.description: Games started (Lahman; nullable). Named lh_GS to avoid collision with the BR GS column.

columns.name: IP
columns.description: Innings pitched, SUM(IPouts)/3.0 (computed from Lahman; nullable)

columns.name: ERA
columns.description: Earned run average, SUM(ER)*9/(SUM(IPouts)/3.0) (computed from Lahman; nullable)

columns.name: awards
columns.description: Comma-delimited list of awards WON in this season (winners only, All-Star included). Awards are sorted alphabetically. Examples: 'All-Star,Cy Young Award', 'All-Star,Gold Glove'. Attached only to first stint row (stint_ID = 1), NULL on later stints. NULL when no awards won. Source: Lahman AwardsPlayers + AllstarFull. Award inception years: MVP from 1922, All-Star from 1933, Cy Young Award from 1956, Gold Glove from 1957, ROY from 1947. NULL before these years does not mean the player did not deserve the award — it did not exist yet.

notes: Lahman pitching stats (W, L, lh_GS, CG, SHO, SV, IP, H, ER, HR, BB, SO, ERA, WP, HBP, BK, BFP) and awards are attached ONLY to the first stint row (stint_ID = 1) and are NULL on later stints. These are full-season totals — do not SUM them when aggregating by player-year. Use MAX(W), MAX(IP), etc. to pull the season total, or filter WHERE stint_ID = 1
Lahman pitching stats are NULL when the season has no matching Lahman row — filter with IS NOT NULL when using them
team_ID is lowercase — always compare case-insensitively or use LOWER()
WAR NULL means no data — use WHERE WAR IS NOT NULL when aggregating
positions is NULL for seasons before 1871 or when Retrosheet data is unavailable — use WHERE positions IS NOT NULL when filtering by position
Lahman pitching stats (W, L, lh_GS, CG, SHO, SV, IP, H, ER, HR, BB, SO, ERA, WP, HBP, BK, BFP) are NULL when the season has no matching Lahman row — filter with IS NOT NULL when using them
lh_GS is the Lahman games-started column; GS is the Baseball Reference games-started column
To query all players (batting + pitching combined): UNION ALL both tables selecting common columns

IMPORTANT: When querying for seasons where a player did NOT win an award (e.g., awards IS NULL or awards NOT LIKE '%All-Star%'), always restrict year_ID to on or after the award's inception: All-Star >= 1933, MVP >= 1922, Cy Young Award >= 1956, Gold Glove >= 1957, ROY >= 1947. Without this filter, pre-inception seasons will incorrectly appear as snubs.

tables.name: lahman_awards
tables.description: Individual awards by player-year from Lahman. One row per player per award per year for ALL ballot finishers (not just winners), including All-Star selections (award = 'All-Star'). Includes voting data from AwardsSharePlayers.csv. Award inception years: MVP from 1922, All-Star from 1933, Cy Young Award from 1956, Gold Glove from 1957. Absence of a row before these years does not mean the player did not deserve the award — it did not exist yet.

columns.name: player_ID
columns.description: Baseball Reference player ID — join to batting.player_ID or pitching.player_ID

columns.name: award
columns.description: Award name — use EXACT strings: 'MVP', 'Cy Young Award', 'ROY', 'Gold Glove', 'Silver Slugger', 'All-Star'. Note: 'Most Valuable Player' is stored as 'MVP' and 'Rookie of the Year' is stored as 'ROY'.

columns.name: lg_ID
columns.description: League (AL, NL); may be NULL for some awards

columns.name: winner
columns.description: TRUE if the player won this award, FALSE if they were a ballot finisher but did not win

columns.name: points_won
columns.description: Points won in voting (nullable, from AwardsSharePlayers). NULL for awards without voting data.

columns.name: points_max
columns.description: Maximum possible points (nullable, from AwardsSharePlayers). NULL for awards without voting data.

columns.name: votes_first
columns.description: Number of first-place votes received (nullable, from AwardsSharePlayers). NULL for awards without voting data.

columns.name: vote_share
columns.description: Vote share, computed as points_won/points_max (nullable). NULL when points_max is 0, NULL, or for awards without voting data.

notes: One row per player-year-award; a player can have multiple rows in a single year
Includes ALL ballot finishers, not just winners — filter WHERE winner = TRUE to get only winners
All-Star selections are folded in with award = 'All-Star' and winner = TRUE
Voting data (points_won, points_max, votes_first, vote_share) is NULL for awards that don't have voting data in Lahman (e.g., some older awards, All-Star)
Source: AwardsSharePlayers.csv (voting data for all finishers) + AwardsPlayers.csv (winners without voting data) + AllstarFull.csv (All-Star selections)

Join to batting/pitching on player_ID and year_ID only — do NOT include lg_ID in the join condition; a player traded mid-season may appear under a different lg_ID in the WAR tables than in this awards table, causing the join to miss them

IMPORTANT: lg_ID for the Cy Young Award is 'ML' (not 'AL'/'NL') for years 1956–1966 when there was only one award. When joining Cy Young winners to pitching WAR data, match on year_ID and player_ID only, or use: COALESCE(NULLIF(a.lg_ID, 'ML'), p.lg_ID) to treat 'ML' as matching any league.

IMPORTANT: When querying for seasons WHERE a player did NOT win or was NOT selected for an award, always add a year_ID filter restricting to years on or after the award's inception: All-Star >= 1933, MVP >= 1922, Cy Young Award >= 1956, Gold Glove >= 1957, ROY >= 1947. Without this filter, pre-inception seasons will incorrectly appear as snubs.

tables.name: lahman_hof
tables.description: Hall of Fame ballot data by player-year from Lahman. One row per player per ballot year (all ballot years, not just inductions).

columns.name: inducted
columns.description: 'Y' if inducted that year, 'N' if not

columns.name: vote_pct
columns.description: Vote percentage, votes/ballots*100 (NULL when ballots is 0 or NULL)

columns.name: voted_by
columns.description: Voting body: BBWAA, Veterans, Negro League, etc.

notes: One row per player per ballot year — a player appears once for every year they were on a ballot
Filter inducted = 'Y' for actual Hall of Fame inductions
vote_pct is NULL when ballots is 0 or NULL

lookups.name: team
lookups.description: Maps team names and nicknames to the canonical team_id value stored in the data (uppercase)

samples.title: Top career war 10
samples.sql: WITH all_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), careers AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY year_id) AS name, ROUND(SUM(war), 2) AS career_war, COUNT(DISTINCT year_id) AS season_count, MIN(year_id) AS min_year, MAX(year_id) AS max_year FROM all_seasons GROUP BY player_id ), rows_numbered AS ( SELECT player_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS rn FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS rn FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_teams AS ( SELECT player_id, team_id, MIN(rn) AS first_appearance FROM rows_numbered GROUP BY player_id, team_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams FROM player_teams GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, c.career_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING (player_id) ORDER BY ROUND(c.career_war, 2) DESC, c.name LIMIT 10

samples.title: Top season wars 10
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, year_id, ROUND(SUM(war), 2) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams FROM ( SELECT player_id, year_id, team_id, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id, team_id ) GROUP BY player_id, year_id ) SELECT s.name, s.season_war, s.year_id, t.teams FROM seasons s JOIN teams t USING (player_id, year_id) ORDER BY s.season_war DESC, s.season_order LIMIT 10

samples.title: Average season war 50
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(war ORDER BY source_order), (x, y) -> x + y) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), player_metadata AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), careers AS ( SELECT s.player_id, m.name, LIST_REDUCE( LIST(s.season_war ORDER BY s.season_first_appearance), (x, y) -> x + y ) AS career_war, COUNT(*) AS season_count, MIN(s.year_id) AS min_year, MAX(s.year_id) AS max_year, m.first_appearance FROM player_seasons s JOIN player_metadata m USING (player_id) GROUP BY s.player_id, m.name, m.first_appearance ), season_teams AS ( SELECT l.player_id, l.year_id, l.team_id, s.season_first_appearance, MIN(l.source_order) AS team_first_appearance FROM all_lines l JOIN player_seasons s USING (player_id, year_id) GROUP BY l.player_id, l.year_id, l.team_id, s.season_first_appearance ), player_teams AS ( SELECT player_id, team_id, MIN(STRUCT_PACK( season_order := season_first_appearance, team_order := team_first_appearance )) AS first_appearance FROM season_teams GROUP BY player_id, team_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams FROM player_teams GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, ROUND(c.career_war / c.season_count, 2) AS average_war, ROUND(c.career_war, 2) AS career_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING (player_id) ORDER BY c.career_war / c.season_count DESC, c.first_appearance

samples.title: Best career war bos 50
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(war ORDER BY source_order), (x, y) -> x + y) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), player_metadata AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), careers AS ( SELECT s.player_id, m.name, LIST_REDUCE( LIST(s.season_war ORDER BY s.season_first_appearance), (x, y) -> x + y ) AS career_war, COUNT(*) AS season_count, MIN(s.year_id) AS min_year, MAX(s.year_id) AS max_year, m.first_appearance FROM player_seasons s JOIN player_metadata m USING (player_id) GROUP BY s.player_id, m.name, m.first_appearance ), rows_numbered AS ( SELECT player_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS rn FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS rn FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_teams AS ( SELECT player_id, team_id, MIN(rn) AS first_appearance FROM rows_numbered GROUP BY player_id, team_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams, BOOL_OR(team_id = UPPER('bos')) AS played_for_team FROM player_teams GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, CASE WHEN ROUND(c.career_war, 2) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(c.career_war, 2) END AS career_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING (player_id) WHERE t.played_for_team ORDER BY ROUND(c.career_war, 2) DESC, c.first_appearance

samples.title: Best or worst n of team bos 30 Worst
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(war ORDER BY source_order), (x, y) -> x + y) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), player_metadata AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), careers AS ( SELECT s.player_id, m.name, LIST_REDUCE( LIST(s.season_war ORDER BY s.season_first_appearance), (x, y) -> x + y ) AS career_war, COUNT(*) AS season_count, MIN(s.year_id) AS min_year, MAX(s.year_id) AS max_year, m.first_appearance FROM player_seasons s JOIN player_metadata m USING (player_id) GROUP BY s.player_id, m.name, m.first_appearance ), rows_numbered AS ( SELECT player_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS rn FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS rn FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_teams AS ( SELECT player_id, team_id, MIN(rn) AS first_appearance FROM rows_numbered GROUP BY player_id, team_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams, BOOL_OR(team_id = UPPER('bos')) AS played_for_team FROM player_teams GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, CASE WHEN ROUND(c.career_war, 2) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(c.career_war, 2) END AS career_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING (player_id) WHERE t.played_for_team ORDER BY c.career_war ASC, c.first_appearance LIMIT 30

samples.title: Best rosters 1000
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LOWER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, year_id, LOWER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(war ORDER BY source_order), (x, y) -> x + y) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), careers AS ( SELECT player_id, LIST_REDUCE( LIST(season_war ORDER BY season_order), (x, y) -> x + y ) AS career_war, MIN(season_order) AS player_order FROM player_seasons GROUP BY player_id ), memberships AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, team_id, MIN(source_order) AS membership_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id, team_id ), rosters AS ( SELECT m.year_id, m.team_id, LIST_REDUCE( LIST(c.career_war ORDER BY c.player_order), (x, y) -> x + y ) AS roster_war, MIN(STRUCT_PACK( player_order := c.player_order, membership_order := m.membership_order )) AS roster_order FROM memberships m JOIN careers c USING (player_id) GROUP BY m.year_id, m.team_id ) SELECT year_id, team_id, CAST(ROUND(roster_war) AS BIGINT) AS roster_war FROM rosters ORDER BY roster_war DESC, roster_order LIMIT 1000

samples.title: Best rosters by franchise
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LOWER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, year_id, LOWER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), careers AS ( SELECT player_id, SUM(war) AS career_war, MIN(source_order) AS player_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), memberships AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, team_id, MIN(source_order) AS membership_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id, team_id ), rosters AS ( SELECT m.year_id, m.team_id, SUM(c.career_war) AS roster_war, MIN(m.membership_order) AS roster_order FROM memberships m JOIN careers c USING (player_id) GROUP BY m.year_id, m.team_id ), ranked AS ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY team_id ORDER BY roster_war DESC, roster_order ) AS team_rank FROM rosters ) SELECT year_id, team_id, CAST(ROUND(roster_war) AS BIGINT) AS displayed_war FROM ranked WHERE team_rank = 1 ORDER BY roster_war DESC, roster_order

samples.title: Best top n seasons 5 50 all-time
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(war ORDER BY source_order), (x, y) -> x + y) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), top_seasons AS ( SELECT * FROM player_seasons QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY season_war DESC, season_first_appearance ) <= 5 ), player_metadata AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), careers AS ( SELECT s.player_id, m.name, LIST_REDUCE( LIST(s.season_war ORDER BY s.season_first_appearance), (x, y) -> x + y ) AS career_war, COUNT(*) AS season_count, MIN(s.year_id) AS min_year, MAX(s.year_id) AS max_year, m.first_appearance FROM top_seasons s JOIN player_metadata m USING (player_id) GROUP BY s.player_id, m.name, m.first_appearance ), player_teams AS ( SELECT l.player_id, l.team_id, MIN(l.source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines l JOIN top_seasons s USING (player_id, year_id) GROUP BY l.player_id, l.team_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams FROM player_teams GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, ROUND(c.career_war, 2) AS career_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING (player_id) ORDER BY ROUND(c.career_war, 2) DESC, c.first_appearance LIMIT 50

samples.title: Best top n seasons 5 50 modern era
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_metadata AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, MAX(year_id) AS career_max_year, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), player_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(war ORDER BY source_order), (x, y) -> x + y) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), ranked_seasons AS ( SELECT s.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY s.player_id ORDER BY s.season_war DESC, s.season_first_appearance ) AS season_rank FROM player_seasons s JOIN player_metadata m USING (player_id) WHERE m.career_max_year >= 1947 ), peak_careers AS ( SELECT s.player_id, m.name, LIST_REDUCE( LIST(s.season_war ORDER BY s.season_first_appearance), (x, y) -> x + y ) AS career_war, COUNT(*) AS season_count, MIN(s.year_id) AS min_year, MAX(s.year_id) AS max_year, m.first_appearance FROM ranked_seasons s JOIN player_metadata m USING (player_id) WHERE s.season_rank <= 5 GROUP BY s.player_id, m.name, m.first_appearance ), selected_teams AS ( SELECT l.player_id, l.team_id, MIN(l.source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines l JOIN ranked_seasons s USING (player_id, year_id) WHERE s.season_rank <= 5 GROUP BY l.player_id, l.team_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams FROM selected_teams GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, ROUND(c.career_war, 2) AS career_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM peak_careers c JOIN teams t USING (player_id) ORDER BY ROUND(c.career_war, 2) DESC, c.first_appearance LIMIT 50

samples.title: Bottom season wars
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, year_id, ROUND(SUM(war), 2) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams FROM ( SELECT player_id, year_id, team_id, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id, team_id ) GROUP BY player_id, year_id ) SELECT s.name, s.season_war, s.year_id, t.teams FROM seasons s JOIN teams t USING (player_id, year_id) ORDER BY s.season_war, s.season_order LIMIT 10

samples.title: Career ruthba01
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, year_id, ROUND(SUM(war), 2) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_order FROM all_lines WHERE player_id = 'ruthba01' GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams FROM ( SELECT player_id, year_id, team_id, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines WHERE player_id = 'ruthba01' GROUP BY player_id, year_id, team_id ) GROUP BY player_id, year_id ) SELECT s.name, s.season_war, s.year_id, t.teams FROM seasons s JOIN teams t USING (player_id, year_id) ORDER BY s.season_order

samples.title: Consecutive seasons with war over 50 8.0
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, SUM(war) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), ordered AS ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY season_order) AS ordinal FROM seasons ), qualifying AS ( SELECT *, ordinal - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY ordinal) AS streak_id FROM ordered WHERE season_war > 8.0 ), streaks AS ( SELECT player_id, streak_id, COUNT(*) AS streak_length, SUM(season_war) AS streak_war FROM qualifying GROUP BY player_id, streak_id ), chosen AS ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY streak_length DESC, streak_war DESC) AS choice FROM streaks ), selected AS ( SELECT q.* FROM qualifying q JOIN chosen c USING (player_id, streak_id) WHERE c.choice = 1 ), player_info AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, MIN(source_order) AS player_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), summary AS ( SELECT s.player_id, p.name, COUNT(*) AS season_count, MIN(s.year_id) AS min_year, MAX(s.year_id) AS max_year, p.player_order FROM selected s JOIN player_info p USING (player_id) GROUP BY s.player_id, p.name, p.player_order ), teams AS ( SELECT s.player_id, STRING_AGG(s.team_id, ',' ORDER BY s.first_appearance) AS teams FROM ( SELECT x.player_id, l.team_id, MIN(l.source_order) AS first_appearance FROM selected x JOIN all_lines l ON l.player_id=x.player_id AND l.year_id=x.year_id GROUP BY x.player_id, l.team_id ) s GROUP BY s.player_id ) SELECT x.name, x.season_count, '(' || x.min_year || '-' || x.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM summary x JOIN teams t USING (player_id) ORDER BY x.season_count DESC, x.player_order LIMIT 50

samples.title: Highest paid careers with negative war 20
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id) team_id,war,COALESCE(salary,0) salary,ROW_NUMBER() OVER() source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id),war,COALESCE(salary,0),1000000000+ROW_NUMBER() OVER() FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id,year_id,SUM(war) season_war,CAST(ROUND(AVG(salary)) AS BIGINT) season_salary FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,year_id ), player_info AS ( SELECT player_id,FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name,MIN(source_order) player_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), careers AS ( SELECT s.player_id,p.name,SUM(s.season_war) career_war,SUM(s.season_salary) salary, COUNT(*) season_count,MIN(s.year_id) min_year,MAX(s.year_id) max_year,p.player_order FROM seasons s JOIN player_info p USING(player_id) GROUP BY s.player_id,p.name,p.player_order ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id,STRING_AGG(team_id,',' ORDER BY first_appearance) teams FROM (SELECT player_id,team_id,MIN(source_order) first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,team_id) GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name,ROUND(c.career_war,2) career_war,c.salary,c.season_count,'('||c.min_year||'-'||c.max_year||')' year_range,t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING(player_id) WHERE c.career_war<0 ORDER BY c.salary DESC,c.player_order LIMIT 20

samples.title: Highest paid seasons by war 20
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id) team_id,war,COALESCE(salary,0) salary,ROW_NUMBER() OVER() source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id),war,COALESCE(salary,0),1000000000+ROW_NUMBER() OVER() FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id,FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name,year_id,SUM(war) season_war,CAST(ROUND(AVG(salary)) AS BIGINT) salary,MIN(source_order) season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,year_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id,year_id,STRING_AGG(team_id,',' ORDER BY first_appearance) teams FROM (SELECT player_id,year_id,team_id,MIN(source_order) first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,year_id,team_id) GROUP BY player_id,year_id ), floor AS (SELECT MIN(season_war) lowest_war FROM seasons) SELECT s.name,ROUND(s.season_war,2) war,s.salary,s.year_id AS "year",t.teams FROM seasons s JOIN teams t USING(player_id,year_id) CROSS JOIN floor WHERE s.salary>0 ORDER BY s.salary/(s.season_war-floor.lowest_war) DESC,s.season_order LIMIT 20

samples.title: Highest paid seasons for team 20 bos
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id) team_id,war,COALESCE(salary,0) salary,ROW_NUMBER() OVER() source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id),war,COALESCE(salary,0),1000000000+ROW_NUMBER() OVER() FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id,FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name,year_id,SUM(war) season_war,CAST(ROUND(AVG(salary)) AS BIGINT) salary,MIN(source_order) season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,year_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id,year_id,STRING_AGG(team_id,',' ORDER BY first_appearance) teams,BOOL_OR(team_id='BOS') is_team FROM (SELECT player_id,year_id,team_id,MIN(source_order) first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,year_id,team_id) GROUP BY player_id,year_id ) SELECT s.name,ROUND(s.season_war,2) war,s.salary,s.year_id AS "year",t.teams FROM seasons s JOIN teams t USING(player_id,year_id) WHERE t.is_team ORDER BY s.salary DESC,s.season_order LIMIT 20

samples.title: Highest paid seasons for team 20 nyy
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id) team_id,war,COALESCE(salary,0) salary,ROW_NUMBER() OVER() source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id),war,COALESCE(salary,0),1000000000+ROW_NUMBER() OVER() FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id,FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name,year_id,SUM(war) season_war,CAST(ROUND(AVG(salary)) AS BIGINT) salary,MIN(source_order) season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,year_id ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id,year_id,STRING_AGG(team_id,',' ORDER BY first_appearance) teams,BOOL_OR(team_id='NYY') is_team FROM (SELECT player_id,year_id,team_id,MIN(source_order) first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,year_id,team_id) GROUP BY player_id,year_id ) SELECT s.name,ROUND(s.season_war,2) war,s.salary,s.year_id AS "year",t.teams FROM seasons s JOIN teams t USING(player_id,year_id) WHERE t.is_team ORDER BY s.salary DESC,s.season_order LIMIT 20

samples.title: Lowest peak season war with career war over 20 60
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, SUM(war) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), careers AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, SUM(war) AS career_war, COUNT(DISTINCT year_id) AS season_count, MIN(year_id) AS min_year, MAX(year_id) AS max_year FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), peaks AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id AS peak_year, season_war AS peak_war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id ORDER BY season_war DESC, season_order) AS peak_rank FROM seasons ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY first_appearance) AS teams FROM (SELECT player_id, team_id, MIN(source_order) AS first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, team_id) t GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, ROUND(c.career_war, 2) AS career_war, CAST(ROUND(p.peak_war, 2) AS VARCHAR) || ' (' || p.peak_year || ')' AS peak_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM careers c JOIN peaks p ON p.player_id = c.player_id AND p.peak_rank = 1 JOIN teams t ON t.player_id = c.player_id WHERE c.career_war > 60 ORDER BY p.peak_war, c.player_id LIMIT 20

samples.title: Highest paid careers by war of players who are currently active 20
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id) team_id,war,COALESCE(salary,0) salary,ROW_NUMBER() OVER() source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id,name_common,year_id,UPPER(team_id),war,COALESCE(salary,0),1000000000+ROW_NUMBER() OVER() FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN('AL','NL') ), seasons AS ( SELECT player_id,year_id,SUM(war) season_war,CAST(ROUND(AVG(salary)) AS BIGINT) season_salary,MIN(source_order) season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,year_id ), player_info AS ( SELECT player_id,FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name,MIN(source_order) player_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), careers AS ( SELECT s.player_id,p.name,SUM(s.season_war) career_war,SUM(s.season_salary) salary, COUNT(*) season_count,MIN(s.year_id) min_year,MAX(s.year_id) max_year,p.player_order FROM seasons s JOIN player_info p USING(player_id) GROUP BY s.player_id,p.name,p.player_order ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id,STRING_AGG(team_id,',' ORDER BY first_appearance) teams FROM (SELECT player_id,team_id,MIN(source_order) first_appearance FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id,team_id) GROUP BY player_id ), floor AS (SELECT MIN(career_war) lowest_war FROM careers) SELECT c.name,ROUND(c.career_war,2) career_war,c.salary,c.season_count,'('||c.min_year||'-'||c.max_year||')' year_range,t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING(player_id) CROSS JOIN floor WHERE c.salary>0 AND c.max_year>=(SELECT MAX(year_id) FROM read_parquet(${batting})) ORDER BY c.salary/(c.career_war-floor.lowest_war) DESC,c.player_order LIMIT 20

samples.title: The steve balboni all stars
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(war ORDER BY source_order), (subtotal, value) -> subtotal + value) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), career_totals AS ( SELECT player_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(season_war ORDER BY season_order), (subtotal, value) -> subtotal + value) AS career_war, COUNT(*) AS season_count, MIN(year_id) AS min_year, MAX(year_id) AS max_year FROM player_seasons GROUP BY player_id ), career_identity AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), careers AS ( SELECT * FROM career_totals JOIN career_identity USING (player_id) ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY season_appearance, team_appearance) AS teams FROM ( SELECT player_id, team_id, MIN(season_appearance) AS season_appearance, MIN(source_order) AS team_appearance FROM ( SELECT player_id, year_id, team_id, source_order, MIN(source_order) OVER (PARTITION BY player_id, year_id) AS season_appearance FROM all_lines ) season_lines GROUP BY player_id, team_id ) GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, ROUND(c.career_war, 2) AS career_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING (player_id) WHERE c.season_count >= 10 AND (c.career_war / c.season_count) < 0.5 ORDER BY c.career_war, c.name

samples.title: The rowland office all stars
samples.sql: WITH all_lines AS ( SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${batting}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') UNION ALL SELECT player_id, name_common, year_id, UPPER(team_id) AS team_id, war, 1000000000 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS source_order FROM read_parquet(${pitching}) WHERE war IS NOT NULL AND lg_id IN ('AL', 'NL') ), player_seasons AS ( SELECT player_id, year_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(war ORDER BY source_order), (subtotal, value) -> subtotal + value) AS season_war, MIN(source_order) AS season_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id, year_id ), career_totals AS ( SELECT player_id, LIST_REDUCE(LIST(season_war ORDER BY season_order), (subtotal, value) -> subtotal + value) AS career_war, COUNT(*) AS season_count, MIN(year_id) AS min_year, MAX(year_id) AS max_year FROM player_seasons GROUP BY player_id ), career_identity AS ( SELECT player_id, FIRST(name_common ORDER BY source_order) AS name, MIN(source_order) AS career_order FROM all_lines GROUP BY player_id ), careers AS ( SELECT * FROM career_totals JOIN career_identity USING (player_id) ), teams AS ( SELECT player_id, STRING_AGG(team_id, ',' ORDER BY season_appearance, team_appearance) AS teams FROM ( SELECT player_id, team_id, MIN(season_appearance) AS season_appearance, MIN(source_order) AS team_appearance FROM ( SELECT player_id, year_id, team_id, source_order, MIN(source_order) OVER (PARTITION BY player_id, year_id) AS season_appearance FROM all_lines ) season_lines GROUP BY player_id, team_id ) GROUP BY player_id ) SELECT c.name, ROUND(c.career_war, 2) AS career_war, c.season_count, '(' || c.min_year || '-' || c.max_year || ')' AS year_range, t.teams FROM careers c JOIN teams t USING (player_id) WHERE c.season_count >= 10 AND c.career_war < 0.0 ORDER BY c.career_war, c.career_order
